title: Show Off Canadian Pecan Stir-fry
description: A rich and gooey dish featuring a sugar syrup braising technique to create a show-off Canadian pecan stir-fry that is dairy-free-friendly.
instructions: Heat unsalted butter and canola oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add pecans to the skillet and stir-fry for about 5 minutes or until golden brown, stirring occasionally.
Remove pecans from the skillet and set aside. Add sugar syrup and vanilla extract to the same skillet and let it dissolve completely.
Return the pecans to the skillet with the liquid mixture and mix well to coat all nuts evenly.
Stir in minced ginger and sliced green onions until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Garnish with pomegranate seeds before serving hot as a dessert or snack.
